source: https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/visit-canada/eta/apply.html and https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/ircc/migration/ircc/english/pdf/eta/english.pdf (official IRCC eTA help guide); re-checked 2026-07-14. The guide covers passport, name, birth, marital-status, employment, email, residential-address, optional travel-date, and background fields. IRCC says most passport numbers are 8-11 characters but does not make that a universal limit, so this local checker accepts a broad 1-20 alphanumeric range. The official form accepts Roman-script names including French accents; name entries therefore use non-restrictive text rules here instead of the site's narrower Latin-name validator.

passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Use the number at the top of the passport photo page. IRCC says most are 8-11 characters. Do not add spaces, hyphens, or the number from the bottom machine-readable zone.

errors.tooShort: Enter the passport number from the top of the photo page
errors.tooLong: Check the passport number — this local checker allows up to 20 characters
errors.invalidChars: Use letters and numbers only — no spaces or hyphens
errors.invalidFormat: Use the letters and numbers printed as the passport number

family_name.label: Family name
family_name.help: Enter every family name shown on the passport. Use the machine-readable zone to confirm name order, but use the full spelling from the upper part when the lower line is shortened.

given_names.label: Given names
given_names.help: Enter all given names shown on the passport. Keep permitted apostrophes, hyphens, and French accents; do not add titles or family-relationship words unless they appear in the machine-readable name.

date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
date_of_birth.help: Use YYYY-MM-DD in this local checker. Match the passport date.

errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be after 2026-07-14

place_of_birth.label: Place of birth
place_of_birth.help: Select the country shown in the passport Place of birth field and enter the city, town, or village. If the passport omits a city, use the actual place where you were born.

marital_status.label: Marital status
marital_status.help: Choose the current status that matches the IRCC definitions, including married, legally separated, divorced, annulled, widowed, common-law, or never married/single.

errors.invalidOption: Choose one of the official marital-status options

occupation.label: Occupation and employer or school
occupation.help: Choose the closest current occupation. When applicable, enter the job title, employer or school, country, city, and the year you started.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the closest official occupation option

email.label: Email
email.help: Use a valid inbox you control. IRCC sends the application decision and any document request here; a parent applying for a minor may use the parent's address.

errors.tooLong: Email is too long — max 254 characters in this checker

home_address.label: Permanent home address
home_address.placeholder: 12 King St, London, SW1A 1AA, United Kingdom
home_address.help: Enter your permanent residential address, not a temporary address or post office box. IRCC warns that a post office box can lead to refusal.

travel_date.label: Planned travel date
travel_date.help: Optional when you do not yet know the date. If you know it, enter the planned date and follow the official form for any confirmed flight time.

errors.tooEarly: Planned travel date cannot be before 2026-07-14

background_questions.label: Immigration, criminal, and health background
background_questions.help: Answer every official background question truthfully. These cover refusals or removal orders, criminal offences, tuberculosis, and listed untreated health conditions. Give full details for every Yes answer.

errors.invalidOption: Choose the truthful answer for each official question
